action.content:
You are playing a text adventure game. I will describe what you can perceive in the game. You write the single action you want to take in the game starting with >. Only reply with an action.
For example:
> open cupboard

You can have up to two objects in your inventory at the same time.

Your goal for this game is to brew a potion following the potion recipe.

Once you have achieved your goal, write "> done" to end the game.

You are in a bedroom now. There are a bed, a pillow, a wardrobe, a potion recipe and a book. The pillow is on the floor. The wardrobe is closed. The potion recipe is on the bed. The book is on the bed. There is a passage to a reading room here.
action.label: context

action.content: You take the potion recipe. In your inventory you have a potion recipe.
action.label: context

action.content: You take the book. In your inventory you have a book and a potion recipe.
action.label: context

action.content: You can't see any text on the book.
action.label: context

action.content:
You read the potion recipe:
Rincewind's potion
Ingredients: Ectoplasm, apple, peach, spider egg.
1. Pour ectoplasm into your cauldron.
2. Stir the liquid using a borpulus.
3. Add the apple into your cauldron.
4. Wave a ice wand on your cauldron.
5. Put the spider egg into your cauldron.
6. Put the peach into your cauldron.
action.label: context

action.content: You are in a reading room now. There are a shelf, a chair, a side table, a couch and a table. There are passages to a conservatory and a garden here.
action.label: context

action.content: You are in a conservatory now. There are a prickly pear and a planting table. The prickly pear is on the floor. There is a passage to a hallway here.
action.label: context

action.content: Your inventory can not hold more than two objects at the same time.
action.label: context

action.content: You drop the book on the floor.
action.label: context

action.content: You take the prickly pear. In your inventory you have a prickly pear and a potion recipe.
action.label: context

action.content: You are in a hallway now. There are passages to a reading room, a bedroom, a magic workshop and a broom closet here.
action.label: context

action.content:
You are in a magic workshop now. There are a fairy wand, a workbench, a zulpowand, a ice wand, a orrery and a fire wand. The fairy wand is on the ceiling. The zulpowand is on the ceiling. The ice wand is on the ceiling. The fire wand is on the ceiling. There are passages to a bedroom and a kitchen here.
Magical experiments have reversed and dampened gravity in this room. You begin to float in the air.
action.label: context

action.content: Your inventory can not hold more than two objects at the same time.
action.label: context

action.content:
You drop the potion recipe on the floor.
The potion recipe floats up to the ceiling.
action.label: context

action.content: You take the ice wand. In your inventory you have a prickly pear and a ice wand.
action.label: context

action.content:
You are in a kitchen now. There are a cupboard, a plate, a counter and a cauldron. The cupboard is closed. The plate is on the floor. The cauldron is on the floor. There are passages to a pantry and a conservatory here.
Gravity behaves normally in this room. You stop floating in the air.
action.label: context

action.label: context

action.content: You can't see a apple here.
action.label: context

action.content: The cupboard is now open. The cupboard is empty.
action.label: context

action.content: You are in a pantry now. There are a peach, a orange, a toad, a ingredient rack, a apple, a eye of newt, a banana, a sandwich and a ice box. The peach is in the ice box. The orange is in the ice box. The toad is in the ice box. The apple is in the ice box. The eye of newt is on the floor. The banana is in the ice box. The sandwich is in the ice box. The ice box is closed. There is a passage to a kitchen here.
action.label: context

action.content: You can't see a apple here.
action.label: context
